data.name: Midnight Shifts with Femboy
data.detailed_description:
本遊戲包含成人內容，僅面向在各自國家或地區達到法定年齡的玩家。所有角色皆為21歲以上。本作品純屬虛構，與任何真實人物、地點或事件無關。

《Midnight Shifts with Femboy》是一款以選擇為核心的敘事型視覺小說，你的決策將直接影響故事走向。你將扮演一名在安靜便利商店工作的夜班員工，但你的日常生活因一名神秘且執著的崇拜者而被打破。

主要玩法包括在店內進行對話與情感互動。在這些互動之間，你可以探索便利商店、與Sora交流，並收集有關那名一直觀察你的男性的線索。你的選擇將決定你們關係的發展。

你能突破他的執念，幫助他療癒，還是會被他的愛吞噬？

遊戲特色：

動畫場景：在故事關鍵時刻解鎖精美的+18動畫場景。

互動探索：點擊並探索便利商店環境，加深與Sora的關係，發現隱藏細節，推進劇情發展。

可解鎖畫廊：畫廊模式可讓你重溫已解鎖的動畫場景，並追蹤故事進度。

情感故事：體驗緊張而親密的故事。你能面對危險的執念，幫助受傷的靈魂療癒，還是會最終被他的愛吞噬？

data.short_description: 在這款沙盒式視覺小說中，你必須在便利商店的夜班中生存，同時被一名執著的崇拜者監視。與環境互動，並與可愛的病嬌Femboy建立微妙的關係。你的選擇將決定你能否幫助他療癒，還是會被他的愛吞噬…
data.supported_languages: 英文, 義大利文, 德文, 阿拉伯文, 印尼語, 日文, 韓文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 泰文, 越南文, 土耳其文, 法文, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲, 繁體中文, 波蘭文, 烏克蘭文, 菲律賓語, 印地語

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 or higher
  • 處理器: 2.0 GHz or faster processor
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX or OpenGL compatible card
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: 10.10+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible (Apple silicon supported through Rosetta 2)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04+
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz 64-bit Intel-compatible
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 3.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

data.name: Midnight Shifts with Femboy
data.detailed_description:
This game contains adult content and is intended only for individuals who are of legal age in their respective country or region. All characters depicted are 21 years of age or older. This work is purely fictional and does not reference any real people, places, or events.

Midnight Shifts with Femboy is a choice-driven, narrative visual novel where your decisions directly impact the story. You take on the role of a night-shift worker at a quiet convenience store, but your routine is shattered by the presence of a mysterious and obsessive admirer.

Your primary gameplay will involve navigating conversations and making emotional encounters in the store. Between these encounters, you can explore the convenience store, interact with Sora, and piece together clues about the man who is watching you. The choices you make will determine the nature of your relationship.

Can you break through his obsession and help him heal or will his love consume you?

Features:

  • Animated Scenes: Unlock beautifully animated +18 scenes at key moments in the story.

  • Interactive Exploration: Click and explore the convenience store environment to deepen your relationship with Sora, uncover hidden details and advance the plot.

  • Unlockable Gallery: A gallery mode that lets you replay any unlocked animated scenes and track your story progress.

  • Emotional Story: Experience a tense and intimate story. Can you navigate a dangerous obsession and help a troubled soul heal, or will his love ultimately consume you?

data.short_description: In this sandbox visual novel, you must survive your shifts at a convenience store while being watched by an obsessive admirer. Interact with your environment and build a delicate bond with a cute yandere femboy. Your choices will determine if you can help him heal or if his love will consume you...
data.supported_languages: English, Italian, German, Arabic, Indonesian, Japanese, Korean, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Thai, Vietnamese, Turkish, French, Portuguese - Brazil, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Polish, Ukrainian, Filipino, Hindi
